# AI Aquarium — QA Test Suite

Playwright regression tests for [AI Aquarium](https://ai-aquarium-phaser.vercel.app).

Tests run against the live deployment and cover all M1 features.

---

## Setup

```bash
npm install
npx playwright install chromium
```

---

## Running Tests

### Full gate (smoke → regression → critical)

```bash
npx playwright test
```

### By tier

```bash
npm run test:smoke       # Fast smoke (8 tests, ~15s)
npm run test:regression  # Full regression suite
npm run test:critical    # Critical loop integrity
```

### Specific spec files

```bash
# M1 debug dashboard
npx playwright test tests/regression/m1-debug-dashboard.spec.js

# M1 activity duration + AI cycle
npx playwright test tests/regression/m1-activity-duration.spec.js

# Slot system / capacity
npx playwright test tests/regression/slot-system.spec.js

# Talk handshaking
npx playwright test tests/regression/talk-handshaking.spec.js

# Fallback logic
npx playwright test tests/regression/fallback-logic.spec.js
```

### With UI (for debugging)

```bash
npx playwright test --ui
```

---

## Configuration

| Setting | Default | Override |
|---------|---------|----------|
| `BASE_URL` | `https://ai-aquarium-phaser.vercel.app` | `.env` file or env var |
| Timeout | 60s per test | `playwright.config.js` |
| Retries | 1 | `playwright.config.js` |

To run against a local or staging deployment:

```bash
BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 npx playwright test
```

---

## Test Structure

```
tests/
├── helpers.js                          # Shared helpers (waitForEngine, pollEngineState, waitForDashboard)
├── smoke/
│   └── app-loads.spec.js               # Page loads, engine init, 3 characters, 10 objects
├── regression/
│   ├── ai-decisions.spec.js            # AI LLM requests, valid action types, 30s interval, dialogue fields
│   ├── character-movement.spec.js      # A* pathfinding, tile movement, bounds check
│   ├── character-facing.spec.js        # FRG-244: facing toward objects + characters during talk
│   │                                   #   (runs against local dev server at localhost:5173)
│   ├── walk-animation.spec.js          # FRG-204: walk animation stutter/freeze fix
│   │                                   #   moveTo resets walk state, large-delta frame accumulation,
│   │                                   #   full 4-frame cycle, walkTimer remainder invariant
│   │                                   #   (runs against local dev server at localhost:5174)
│   ├── contextual-interaction-animations.spec.js  # FRG-243: contextual anim per object type,
│   │                                   #   spriteKey/interactAnim during+after interaction, live sim,
│   │                                   #   all 9 interaction sprites (runs against localhost:3000)
│   ├── object-interaction.spec.js      # Object state transitions, debug panel
│   ├── speech-bubbles.spec.js          # Dialogue lines, pendingSpeech, speech timer
│   ├── m1-debug-dashboard.spec.js      # Debug page layout, real-time updates, pause/resume,
│   │                                   #   position/facing/target fields, reset behavior, speed controls
│   ├── m1-activity-duration.spec.js    # Activity timers, 30s AI cycle, action types

# AI Aquarium QA — Memory

## Project
- QA repo: https://github.com/chillkimtest-oss/ai-aquarium-qa.git at /home/gem/project
- Source repo: https://github.com/chillkimtest-oss/ai-aquarium-phaser.git (cloned per feature branch)
- Tests: Playwright, `/home/gem/project/tests/`, runs against local dev servers

## Source Repo Architecture (feature/frg-245 branch confirmed)
- Static site, no package.json — serve with `python3 -m http.server PORT`
- Phaser loaded from CDN: `cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/phaser@3.88.2`
- `window._gameEngine` already exposed in `scene.js create()` — no route injection needed
- Grid: 19 cols × 13 rows; interior walkable: col 1–17, row 2–9 (minus object tiles)
- Character identifiers: use `c.label` (Maple/Sol/Nyx), NOT `c.id` (doesn't exist)

## Actual Engine/Character API
- `engine._buildDynamicWalkable(excludeChar)` — clones static grid, marks other chars blocked
- `engine._findAdjacentWalkable(tx, ty, walkable?)` — first cardinal free tile
- `engine._doWander(char)` — wander + deadlock escape logic
- `engine.update(deltaMs)` — one sim tick (no manualTick, no timeScale)
- `engine.objectEngine.getById(id)` — NOT `.get()`; IDs: stove,fridge,tea_set,kotatsu,tv,bookshelf,desk,bed,easel,bonsai
- `char.moveTo(tx, ty, walkable?)` — A*, returns boolean; resets _failedMoveCount on success
- `char._failedMoveCount` — deadlock counter; resets to 0 on success or escape
- No `_moveCharWithCollision`, `_findFreeInteractTile`, `_retryTimer`, `_retryCount`, `_pendingTarget`, `manualTick`, `aiMode`, `snapshot`
- Disable AI for tests: `engine.aiEngine = null`

## Test Patterns
- `page.evaluate()` runs synchronously (blocks rAF loop) — safe to call engine.update() multiple times
- For 120s stability: call `engine.update(5000)` 24 times in one evaluate
- Deadlock test: mock `char.moveTo = () => false`, call `_doWander()`, verify `_failedMoveCount === 0`
- Port mapping by feature: frg-244→5173, frg-204→5174, frg-245→5175, frg-243→3000

## Spec Files (tests/regression/)
- `collision-avoidance.spec.js` — FRG-245, 5 tests, localhost:5175
- `character-facing.spec.js` — FRG-244, localhost:5173
- `walk-animation.spec.js` — FRG-204, localhost:5174
- `contextual-interaction-animations.spec.js` — FRG-243, localhost:3000

## Status
DONE

## What Changed
- `tests/regression/collision-avoidance.spec.js` — Complete rewrite to use the actual Engine/Character API. Removed 7 tests using non-existent methods (`_moveCharWithCollision`, `_findFreeInteractTile`, `_retryTimer/_retryCount/_pendingTarget`, `manualTick`, `aiMode`, `snapshot`). Replaced with 5 correct tests covering the same behaviors via the real API. All 5 tests pass.

## Key Decisions
- **Dropped route injection**: `window._gameEngine` is already unconditionally set in `scene.js create()` — no HTML patching needed
- **`engine.update(deltaMs)` for stability test**: runs 120s of sim-time synchronously in one `page.evaluate()` (blocks rAF — no double-tick), replacing the non-existent `manualTick()`
- **Deadlock escape via mocked `moveTo`**: overrides `char.moveTo = () => false` so all 15 wander attempts fail, triggering the escape path and resetting `_failedMoveCount` to 0
- **`c.label` not `c.id`**: characters have no `.id` property; `label` (Maple/Sol/Nyx) is the correct identifier
- **MAP_COLS = 19** (was 16 in the old spec)
- **Object ID `kotatsu` / row-2 corridor for path test**: avoided non-existent `cafe_espresso`; placed blocker at `(6,2)` on a straight-line path to force a verified detour through row 3

## PR / Branch
- Pushed directly to `main` on `chillkimtest-oss/ai-aquarium-qa`

Removed 7 tests using non-existent methods (`_moveCharWithCollision`, `_findFreeInteractTile`, `_retryTimer/_retryCount/_pendingTarget`, `manualTick`, `aiMode`, `snapshot`). Replaced with 5 correct tests covering the same behaviors via the real API. All 5 tests pass.

## Key Decisions
- **Dropped route injection**: `window._gameEngine` is already unconditionally set in `scene.js create()` — no HTML patching needed
- **`engine.update(deltaMs)` for stability test**: runs 120s of sim-time synchronously in one `page.evaluate()` (blocks rAF — no double-tick), replacing the non-existent `manualTick()`
- **Deadlock escape via mocked `moveTo`**: overrides `char.moveTo = () => false` so all 15 wander attempts fail, triggering the escape path and resetting `_failedMoveCount` to 0
- **`c.label` not `c.id`**: characters have no `.id` property; `label` (Maple/Sol/Nyx) is the correct identifier
- **MAP_COLS = 19** (was 16 in the old spec)
- **Object ID `kotatsu` / row-2 corridor for path test**: avoided non-existent `cafe_espresso`; placed blocker at `(6,2)` on a straight-line path to force a verified detour through row 3
